uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14821 hand-flips node_build_loop_projection_compute to canonical def-B via the OMN-14781 path: the entrypoint param is retyped object-> ModelEventMessage and the dead legacy execute()/_safe_correlation_id ProtocolHandler path is removed, while the projection business logic (project/_extract_payload/_first_str/_extract_timestamp/_extract_correlation_id/_coerce_event_message) is preserved byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD and re-derived from git by the ratchet. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green runtime-dispatch parity tests over the selected corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim; the JSON-decode/non-object error branches are covered by the existing patched unit suite (test_project_raises_*) and are not re-driven through the deterministic SUCCESS-only dispatch corpus.
